TRANSCRIPT
MODULE Three – Introduction to Module Three
Executive Summary:
• 	Until now most of the content has been conceptual and high level. Going forward
we’re going to get into the nitty-gritty.
• 	You’ll learn exactly how PLF works and how it has created success for so many PLF
Owners. You’ll also see how all the pieces fit together and learn all the hardcore
concepts.
• 	In Module 3 we’ll cover getting to the money fast.
• 	The two fastest and easiest types of launches: the Seed Launch and the Quick Launch
o 	Seed Launch: you start with no list or product and you get paid to create
your product
o 	Quick Launch: you already have a list, offer, or product - it’s a way to get a
quick cash infusion that’s easy and fun
• 	If you’re just starting out or want to test a new idea a Seed Launch works very well
• 	In the Business Launch Formula, we mentioned there are 3 big guns in the launch
world: Seed Launch, Internal Launch, and JV Launch. A 4th addition would be the
Quick Launch.
• 	Remember this is about baby steps - taking small incremental steps that add up to
huge exponential change. For example, get the opt in up, publish a blog post, get an
email written, etc. No one is an instant success - it’s all about these small steps.
• 	One of the easiest baby steps you can take is getting involved in the community.
Encourage people, ask questions, and get involved.
• 	All the hard work you did in Module 1 & 2 is about to start coming to fruition.
!
!
!

TRANSCRIPT
MODULE Three – Introduction to Module Three
TRANSCRIPT:
Welcome to Module 3.
In Modules 1 and 2, I gave you a ton of frameworks. We talked about the core
strategies and the tactics of Product Launch Formula. We talked about the Business
Launch Formula. We talked about the mental triggers and how to use story in your
launches and in your business. I really think Modules 1 and 2, you just don't do
anything else and your business life will never be the same, but at the same point,
that was some pretty conceptual stuff. It was some pretty intense stuff.
Now it's time to drill down and get nitty-gritty, because there is a lot going on
behind the scenes in PLF. But I didn't get to where I am at, in terms of creating this
amazing success for my PLF owners, by teaching conceptual stuff. Now it's time to
get into the nitty-gritty, into the “how to do this stuff,” the hardcore, exactly where
pieces fit together.
In Module 3 we're going to talk about, “getting to the money fast.” That's what
this is all about. It's about the two fastest and easiest types of launches – the Seed
Launch and the Quick Launch.
The Seed Launch, that's where you start out with no list and no
product and you basically get paid to create your product and it's
awesome.
The Quick Launch is if you already have a list, if you already
have an offer, a product, then it's a way to get a really quick cash
infusion and it's simple, easy, fun, and it can be quite lucrative.
If you're just starting out, Seed Launch is awesome. Also, if you have a new
idea you want to test out, if you want to get paid to create a product before you
actually... You get paid before you create the product. That's what I'm trying to say.
That's a Seed Launch. The Quick Launch is just super simple way to bring in a bunch
of cash quickly.
In the Business Launch Formula, there are those three big guns of the launch
world.
!
!
!

-- 3 of 4 --

TRANSCRIPT
MODULE Three – Introduction to Module Three
1. 	There's the Seed Launch, where you're just starting out.
2. 	There's the Internal Launch, when you just launch to your list.
3. 	There's the JV Launch where you really blow it up and you bring in
other people to help you promote.
Those are the three big guns and the fourth one is the Quick Launch.
In this module, we're going to do Quick Launch and the Seed
Launch. And as we go forward, in the next module and the next module, we'll get
deep into the Internal Launch and the JV Launch.
You're doing fantastic, to be in Module 3, you're the cream of the crop. And
the thing you have to remember is that it is about baby steps. It's about taking those
small, incremental steps that add up to huge exponential change. That's how I got to
where I'm at. It's just by taking one small step, getting the opt-in form up, getting
that blog post published, getting that email written – one step at a time. No one is an
instant success. It is baby steps.
One of the easiest baby steps for you is to take part in the community. Leave a
comment, encourage people, ask questions. One of the absolute best, easiest steps
you can take. Leave a comment on this video. Just say, “Jeff, I love it. I'm here.” Just
say, “Jeff, I'm here.” That's all I want, just to get you moving, because I do know...
I've taught thousands and thousands of people and it's about taking those baby steps,
it's about staying the course, it's about those small, incremental changes that add up
to big changes.
Lots of people have been down this path before. They've just taken this
material, they've gone through the material, they followed the formula, and they've
rocked it. That's what you need to do. Just keep on taking those small steps, moving
through it. Lots of people have had success.
One of the best things you can do is go back through after you go through the
whole module, then go back and watch it a second time. Because that's what I always
do. If I'm really digging into a course, into a book or something, then it's like, “Wow.
This is really where it's at. This is where I'm going. This is what I want to pursue.” I'll
get to the end and then I'll just go right back to the beginning and start it over.
Repetition, it's the mother of all learning.
!
!
!
